title: Reported questions: si, où, quand
subtitle: Say what someone asked you.
duolingoBridge: This connects question practice to real conversation: telling another person what was asked.
overview: Knowledge point 1: use si for yes/no reported questions.
Knowledge point 2: keep question words like où and quand after demander.

items.fr: Il m’a demandé si j’étais libre vendredi.
items.en: He asked me if I was free on Friday.
items.es: Me preguntó si estaba libre el viernes.

items.en: She asked me where I lived.

items.fr: On m’a demandé quand le rendez-vous commençait.
items.en: They asked me when the appointment started.
items.es: Me preguntaron cuándo empezaba la cita.

items.fr: J’ai demandé si le magasin était encore ouvert.
items.en: I asked if the store was still open.
items.es: Pregunté si la tienda todavía estaba abierta.

items.fr: Il a demandé pourquoi je voulais changer de cours.
items.en: He asked why I wanted to change classes.
items.es: Preguntó por qué quería cambiar de curso.
